entry.title: Re: Redirect files that can be uploaded by Commerce custo...
entry.content:
Dear @joaocarreira,

In anwer to your query, whenever one split a large redirect file into multiple ones and attempt to upload them to Cloud Portal, they would be indeed overriding each other. This is for it was designed to support only a single redirect file.

In order to resolve this issue you could follow the resolution described in KBA 3101008, which is either:

  • Simplify your redirect set rules so they are smaller than the threshold.
  • Try to use RedirectMatch instead, or.
  • Use a CDN and apply the redirect rules on a CDN level.
  • Implement via JavaScript.

Also worth mentioning KBA 3120098 - Questions about Redirect Sets in SAP Commerce Cloud in the Public Cloud.

 

Hope you'll find this anwer useful.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Dynamically sum up...
entry.content: To achieve the flexibility you're seeking in your calculation, where you want to dynamically sum up the last 12 months from the current month, you can use date functions and relative references. 1.Start by obtaining the current month and year. You can use date functions available in your tool or programming language to do this. 2.Subtract 12 months from the current month to determine the starting month of the 12-month period. 3.Use the current month as the end date of your period. 4.Sum up the values within the specified date range. Start_Date = Current_Date - 12 Months End_Date = Current_Date Sum(Values) Where Date >= Start_Date and Date <= End_Date SELECT SUM(Value) FROM Table WHERE Date >= DATEADD(MONTH, -12, CURRENT_DATE) AND Date <= CURRENT_DATE

entry.title: Re: 🇨🇭 Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA (Zurich, CH)
entry.content:
Hi @Sadullah . So we have exactly 26 registrations now 🙂 after one person resigned.

Will I see you in Zurich on Friday?

entry.title: Re: Calling Custom Adobe form in ABAP On Cloud (Embedded Steampunk)
entry.content: @AR77 Can you please let me know if you were able to achieve the requirement of printing of an Abobe form from a custom Action button of custom RAP application in SAP Public cloud system?

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Dynamically sum up...
entry.content:
@guenay 

Keep your aggregate and write to as it is but change your memberset as below

MEMBERSET [d/ZACCOUNT_TEST]="SALARY"
MEMBERSET [d/Date]= PREVIOUS(12,"MONTH",TODAY()) TO PREVIOUS(1,"MONTH",TODAY())

DATA([d/ZACCOUNT_TEST]="SALARYPREV12",[d/Date]="202401")=RESULTLOOKUP()

 

I am just writing the sum to 202401. This will be dynamic based on current date and hence current month.

 

 

Br.

Nikhil

entry.title: Crystal Reports 2020 not retrieving databases ... driver/provider?
entry.content:
Hello,

I have installed Crystal Reports 2020 onto windows server 2016 (Trialling out first before installing on my machine, replacing existing Crystal reports, older version). Trying to connect to sql server 2019 running on windows server 2019. When adding new connection, I select OLE DB (ADO) , then select "microsoft ole db provider for SQL Server". I type in server name, click windows auth tickbox, then when clicking on the database dropdown, nothing happens for a minute, then drop down is empty.

Not quite sure what is happening here, I think this could be something to do with Microsoft OLE DB provider (which I believe is SQLOLEDB) not supporting TLS 1.2. Came to this guess as when I tried selecting the SQL Server native client, the databases did load ok; but my understanding is that this is deprecated.

If this issue is to do with drivers/providers, what is the recommended driver/ provider for Crystal Reports / SQL Server?

Or please let me know if there could be another explanation.

Thank you

entry.title: SAP Build Apps + Google Vertex AI API ( Gemini Pro ) + CAP - Get Gemini API inside SAP Build Apps..
entry.content:
As we are witnessing one of the exciting time in the field of AI and lots of experiments and evolutions are still happening , the things we never thought of are coming into reality hence the only option for us to Keep adopting these beautiful break through in tech. and Keep supporting Supporting community and Humanity by every means.

Intended Audience:

Someone who wants to start exploring these APIs and willing to integrate/consume them inside SAP BTP Box then this is your article to read.

Hi All ,

As i have stated above this article is written to give you information about how can we leverage google vertex AI APIs into SAP Build Apps smoothly by adding the CAP Layer in middle to establish communication between them.

Lets start enabling and Testing Vertex API on google cloud.

  • Login into your GCP account and create a project name it "callGeminiAPI" or something.
  • Select your project and now enable Vertex AI APIs - Choose enable and go to Vertex AI Dashboard.

Once you enabled these API , you can see this screen and try out few prompts before we switch to consumption of these APIs/Models.

Lets try some prompt for converting an email request data into particular JSON format using this model , you can try prompts according to your need/testing.

Disclaimer: I am not promoting any AI Product , I am just exploring these APIs and sharing the learning and possibilities of consumption/integration with them.

 

Prompt : I uploaded the above image and added a simple text "What is this image about ?" and got a satisfactory answer from API.

 

I think we are good here , i am not gonna add other prompts here , i shall request you to try out few more prompts and check accuracy and results carefully before deciding the usage of these APIs.

Next Part: How to consume these APIs in SAP CAP.

  • Create a simple CAP Application using BAS/VSCode , I prefer VSCode hence going with that
  • Install required libraries related to Vertex AI APIs.
  • Get your authentication file downloaded from GCP Account ( Most important ) to Authorize the API Calls

Lets do this. let download the service key from your service Account in GCP.

Navigate to your project -> To Service Account and Click create/ Add new Key download JSON and Save it somewhere on your computer.

Go to your Vertex AI API Prompt and navigate to Code section and get the Code Choose NodeJS code as we are going to use exactly the same code to call these APIs from CAP.

Note: I am not going to add anything related to CAP Application , this will be a simple Application with one entity called GEMINI prompt as an input and response in output and create a corresponding handler to handle the incoming request from UI.

Once you click on Get Code , you will get the NodeJS Code related to this API , install required libraries and test the integration.

if you are good with CAP Layer integration with Vertex AI then you will be able to test these APIs from POSTMAN Successfully , Make sure to Authenticate request successfully before model call otherwise it is gonna give you some error related to unauthorized.

Lets test these APIs from POSTMAN now.

So we have completed CAP Integration , Awesome lets build and deploy this API into your BTP Box.

MBT Build + CF Deploy _mtar -> Done ?

Final Part: Integrate CAP APIs into your SAP Build App.

Go to your BTP Cockpit and Open SAP Build Apps 

Choose create an Application and select Mobile App ( aka Appgyver )

Create a Simple Application with one input one button and an output field ( A Chatbot interface ).

Integration with CAP APIs.

Go to Data Section and choose Rest Based Direct Integration

  1. Get Oauth token for CAP API Call
  2. Call Gemini API using this token 

These APIs will be integrated at the button click event to complete the call to backend.

Lets Test this Application end-2-end.

 

At last : Don't forget to share feedback/suggestions if any. 

#KeepLearning#KeepSharing

Thanks - Shivam

entry.title: Re: AUSP Characteristic values Transpose - for selections
entry.content: Good morning. Were you able to produce this report? I have the same task. I will be grateful for the information.

entry.title: Re: Content Catalog Sync is taking too long or much time
entry.content:
There's no simple answer for this question. There are several steps in order to improve performance of Catalog Synchronization. Here are few tips:

  1. If SAP Commerce Cloud is where your implementation is hosted, a database analysis is necessary to find the expensive queries. If locally or on premise, JDBC logs can help.

  2. Increasing the number of threads ( catalog.sync.workers ) in the service configuration or local.properties. On Cloud default value of this property is #cores, which calculates number of threads per CPU core.

  3. Reduction of Root Types, i.e the ones coming from an external system. It should also be considered whether there is a need to synchronize product images and other media. There can be a really huge number of medias in the catalog and the media can have a very big impact on synchronization performance. In many cases the synchronization of media can just be avoided.

  4. Ordering of root types. In case there are custom catalog item types, the ordering needs to be adapted according to the data model.

  5. Disabling attributes. If some attributes are not needed in the Online catalog version then these can be removed from the synchronization rule.

  6. Setting Sync languages. The languages of the catalog version should be set to ensure that only the localized values are copied for the supported languages.

  7. Queries with missing indexes

  8. You have some relations where one side of the relations has a high cardinality. For example I have seem one one project we have a category with 200K products. You can disable one side of the relation if this is the case (e.g. disable category.products)

credit: https://community.sap.com/t5/customer-relationship-management-q-a/content-catalog-sync-is-taking-too-long-or-much-time/qaq-p/12808042

entry.title: Re: Direct link to source system in Signavio Process Insi...
entry.content:
Good day Giuseppe,

Thank you for reaching out!  Direct links from the business object instances in detail lists, to the corresponding business object instance in the ERP source system, are only available if you're using ST-PI 7.40 SP25.  I have attached a link here Direct System Connection for ERP Systems to provide additional information:

Kind regards,

Kantrice

entry.title: Why are standard CDS Views not showing in Custom CDS View app to use as a reference?
entry.content:
I am attempting to follow the guide: Setup Guide
General Ledger Master Record Creation Process using SAP Workflow Management or SAP Build Process Automation.

The Guide has these instructions for creating the necessary Custom CDS Views:

Steps for Creating Custom CDS:
1. Click on Custom CDS app in Fiori Launchpad.
2. Select standard CDS view name like -ICompanycode and click on Create button
3. Enter the custom CDS view name like -ZZ1_COMPANYCODE and Select the specific fields
from standard CDS view and click on Save
4. After SAVE click on publish button to create API-ZZ1_COMPANYCODE_CDS which is used
to register OData service.
5. Repeat same steps for other CDS views.

 

However, the new Custom CDS View app does not bring in the standard CDS Views to select in step 2. I have seen other Community Q&A indicating that the new Custom CDS View App does not show the Standard CDS Views like the deprecated version had done.   How do I create the Custom CDS Views with reference to standard?

automatec-period-opening-in-sap.pdf (wordpress.com)

entry.title: Re: The Perspective Toolbar is Missing when Smart edit is...
entry.content:
Hello! 

The missing of perspective toolbar in SmartEdit is usually related to the webApplicationInjector.js not being correctly configured or missing parameters. With that in mind, I recommend you checking below Knowledge Article where we explain the best practices and how to troubleshoot webApplicationInjector related errors:

3229569 - webApplicationInjector missing or misconfigured in SmartEdit - SAP Commerce Cloud

entry.title: Re: Sync button user restriction main page
entry.content:
Hey there!

You can achieve the scenario you are looking for by managing the permissions an user receives. As per the documentation I will be attaching below, you can determine different permissions for different Content Catalogs, where one can have or not to synchronize them. Kindly check below more information on the topic:

  • Users, User Groups, and Permissions in SmartEdit
  • Assigning Users and Usergroups to Content Catalogs 

Kind Regards,
Wesley
SAP Commerce Cloud Product Support - Brasil

entry.title: Re: Live Process General ledger Creation
entry.content: We've just started looking at this same content package and I'm interested to know if you have it working yet?

entry.title: Re: Update Sales BOM master data
entry.content:
Hi EmanueleB

 

In S/4HANA CLoud we have the API API_ORDER_BILL_OF_MATERIAL_SRV for Sales Order BOMs

https://api.sap.com/api/API_ORDER_BILL_OF_MATERIAL_SRV/overview

You should be able to call this API through a custom app in BTP

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: How do I best organize large Data Services jobs for reliability?
entry.content:
We have about 2000 data flows currently organized in about 500 work flows and 50 jobs.  The jobs are run using ActiveBatch, an enterprise scheduling tool.  Although some of the objects are sequential due to required prerequisites, most of them are simply designed to spread out and organize the load.

Currently some of the largest tables that take hours to load have their own job.  Other jobs are small and can be rerun easily.  But some jobs have a large number of data flows and/or large tables and take a long time to run.  When these have an error, it's complicated, as we don't always have time to rerun the job.  So I'm looking for ways to reorganize things to recover more easily; I need to get as much data as possible loaded as fast as possible, without rerunning more than is necessary and with the ability to move past unresolvable errors.

There are two main scenarios: (1) transient errors such as memory, in which case the job can usually be rerun successfully, and (2) data issues, in which case the job would fail again.  In the ideal world we could just use recovery mode, but it needs an option to either skip or rerun the failed objects.  And we have not been able to get it to work with ActiveBatch anyway.

For scenario 2, in most cases we would rather have the job skip over the bad data and continue and load everything possible.  It seems to do this when the table is loaded in bulk mode, but that is not an option with template tables.  I tried using overflow files but that didn't help.  There ought to be a setting for jobs/workflows to continue in the case of failure.  There are options like like try/catch blocks and status tables, but that would take a lot of work.

One option is to put more data flows into a single workflow and letting the max number of processes regulate it.  Since a job won't fail until the workflow is complete that the failed data flow is in, this would allow everything to complete except the one that failed.  This would be good for scenario 2 but bad for scenario 1 as we'd have to rerun everything.  I am dumbfounded that DS doesn't have a setting to regular the number of processes at the server level though.  

The ideal way would be to put everything into its own job and manage it in ActiveBatch, but that is a different group and they wouldn't be too happy about it.  But I think I probably need to break things up into more jobs one way or another.

So I'm wondering what your strategies are.  Thanks.

entry.title: Re: S4HC attachment API API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV - value lis...
entry.content:
Hi Minh

 

The SAPObjectNodeType, SAPObjectType , SemanticObject, BusinessObjectTypeName to use depends on the Object you want to download , for example attachments for Sales Order , Journal Entries

Please can you tell me for an objects you want to download and i can check

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: SmartEdit no blue overlay
entry.content:
Hey there!

Usually drag-n'-drop unwanted behaviors are caused due to typerestrictions errors found in the console of the browser. For this type of scenario, the recommendation is following below Knowledge Article where we explain how to troubleshoot and fix them:

3091450 - "Cannot find type restrictions for the given slotIds." error in SmartEdit - SAP Commerce Cloud 

Kind Regards,
Wesley
SAP Commerce Cloud Product Support - Brasil

entry.title: Re: SAP Commerce smartedit CX-PREVIEW API redirects
entry.content:
Hey there!

This is a known error for when the WCMS Preview URL is not correctly configured or matching the Storefront URL. Luckily we have a Knowledge Article with further information and how to resolve this unwanted behavior:

3421373 - Preview URL not set correctly, returning a 404 error on browser console - SAP Commerce Cloud 

Kind Regards,
Wesley
SAP Commerce Cloud Product Support - Brasil

entry.title: Re: Smartedit blankpage issue
entry.content:
Hey there,

This unwanted behavior is fixable if below properties are applied as per our documentation HTTPS Traffic Certificate:

additional.javax.net.ssl.trustStore=
additional.javax.net.ssl.trustStorePassword=

Kind Regards,
Wesley
SAP Commerce Cloud Product Support - Brasil

entry.title: Re: smartEditPerspectiveToolbar not visible on storefront...
entry.content:
Hello! 

The missing of perspective toolbar in SmartEdit is usually related to the webApplicationInjector.js not being correctly configured or missing parameters. With that in mind, I recommend you checking below Knowledge Article where we explain the best practices and how to troubleshoot webApplicationInjector related errors:

3229569 - webApplicationInjector missing or misconfigured in SmartEdit - SAP Commerce Cloud

Kind Regards,
Wesley
SAP Commerce Cloud Product Support - Brasil

entry.title: Re: Smartedit 2011 paragraph editor not saving
entry.content:
Hey There!

The "Style Classes" field in SmartEdit is used with Composable Storefront (formerly known as Spartacus) which will store style class information, so the storefront can apply render logic based on it.

You are probably facing this unwanted behavior with the HTML in paragraph component due to before 1905.19, CKEditor.config.allowedContent is always true in CKEditor config which enables the inline style. For security reason there was introduced new property "cms.components.allowUnsafeJavaScript" in SmartEdit. The property is set to "false" by default, requiring to set it to "true" to be able to inject HTML scripts in paragraph components.

Kind Regards,
Wesley
SAP Commerce Cloud Product Support - Brasil

entry.title: Re: Why many components are blacklisted in smartedit?
entry.content:
Hey There!

As per SmartEdit FAQ - Components, the components are blocked because new storefronts don't support them by default. If your storefront implementation or version supports a blocked component, you can remove it from the attribute blocklist and then edit them using SmartEdit.

Hope this helps answering your doubt!

Kind Regards,
Wesley
SAP Commerce Cloud Product Support - Brasil

entry.title: Re: SAP AIF Index table always stores first occurrence of...
entry.content:
Thank You very much @lei_su, for your suggestions. I create a new table ( copy of /AIF/MIDX_TEMPL) and added my key fields in it and changes the settings in

SAP Application Interface Framework > Error Handling > Define Interface-Specific Features

set Multi.Selection Type to M. Multiple Selection and gave the new Table name in Message Index Table Name.

When I save it gives an error Use a different index table for single selection; 010 field in SAP AIF I also changed the Index table name in

SAP Application Interface Framework > Error Handling > Define Namespace-Specific Features.
Could please tell where it might be going wrong.

entry.title: Error when I set the data source of a data action in Build Apps
entry.content:
I have a Build App project where I have a dropdown that I want to set a data source on.  I created an Action with a GET request for months within a given year.  When I test the action, I get a 200 response and 12 months come back.  I then release and publish the action to the library.

When I try to add that action as a Data Source, I get this message. I've tried waiting but I get the same thing every time.

I'm hoping that someone has had this issue before and knows of a solution.

Thanks in advance!

Ron

entry.title: Re: How to add Snowflake as a source for SAP Datasphere or SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Stefan,

Thanks for the very informative blog.  Using this blog, I manage to get my BW/4HANA system working with Snowflake via SDI - DP Agent.  It's been working ever since I read this blog almost two years ago.

However, something new has come up.   

When I try to create a virtual table from a SNOWFLAKE view, I get the following error:
SAP DBTech JDBC: [403]: internal error: Failed to create virtual table: duplicate column name: BASE_UOM: line 1 col 1038

I've upgraded to DP Agent 2.7.3.2 -- windows version with snowflake-jdbc-3.13.26.jar, and I'm still having the same problem.

 

No errors are showing in the framework.trc.   

What additional this should I look for to troubleshoot this issue.

Regards,

Mel Calucin

entry.title: Re: Simulation SAP Enable Now
entry.content: Make sure Authoring Settings > Recording > Simulation / Documentation > Practice Bubble at Element is deselected.

entry.title: Setting Year parameter to Data Action based on input control MMYYYY
entry.content:
Hi experts. 

In my story I have a Forecast layout table with an calculation input control for cut-over date. 

I have a Data_Action_1 which needs as parameter: 1.The result of the calculation input control . Why input control is not shown on selection options?

2. Year. This should be the same year as for calculation input control. For example if calculation input control is: Aug, 2023, then Year= 2023; if calculation input control is: Nov, 2024 , then Year=2024. 

Actually,  Data_Action_1 shows prompts for: calculation input control (Fecha Inicio Proyección) and year (Año Proyeccion). 

 

How can I pass year from calculation input control (Fecha Inicio Proyeccion) to Year parameter  (Año Proyeccion) ?

 

Thanks , please help!!

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports 2020 not retrieving databases ... dri...
entry.content:
Hi Colin_F,  I'm running SQL Server 2019:

  • OLE to SQL Server works for me with V 18.6.5.0 of the 64 bit driver.
  • Also using a 64 bit DSN with the SQL Server Wire Protocol (version installed with CR 2020) works as well.
  • ODBC with 64 bit SQL Server Driver 18 works AOK.

Do the other (non-OLE) options listed above work for you?  One step when moving to 2020 from earlier versions is that DSNs must be moved to the 64 bit versions as well as do drivers and clients if applicable.

entry.title: Filter on Account Dimension in SAC Model or Story
entry.content:
Hi,
As the Account dimension in SAC Planning is not feasible, is there a way to restrict a range of GL Accounts in a SAC story or at the Planning model please?

I tried both in Optimized and Classic mode but in vain. 

Any insights are helpful.

Thanks,

Jothi

entry.title: How do I obtain the oOrders.Lines.VisualOrder property after adding a new order line DI API
entry.content:
I am adding a new order line ( AR Sales order - Item type)  and updating it.

I need to obtain the newly added line ( Lines.VisualOrder ) as soon as I have added.

I would prefer to do this without having to do a SQL query.  Any tips are appreciated.

entry.title: Re: How to request an Enhancement for SAP Security?
entry.content: Are you able to connect to an SAP user group such as DSAG or ASUG? They may have influence or insights.

entry.title: Re: About Workarea Folder Structure in SAP Enable Now for Simulations & In-App Content
entry.content:
Hi Angad,

No, you should not let the content under the Unsorted folder grow; this will ultimately lead to performance issues with your Enable Now system.  It's good that you are structuring the content under the Content folder but that entire structure should be moved out and placed into the actual content structure.

You are unlikely to use a similar structure for in-app help, assuming that you mean SAP Companion, because the vast majority of your content creation and management occurs through the SAP Companion interface.  I would move all SAP Companion content objects, such as Guided Tours and Context Help content, out of the Unsorted folder and place it into a content structure but you don't need to worry about the Creation vs Published level for this type of content.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: SAP AIF Index table always stores first occurrence of...
entry.content:
The error message "Use a different index table for single selection; 010 field" indicates you have wrongly maintained the same table in field Message Idx Table (/AIF/CUST => Define Namespace-Specific Features => Define Interface-Specific Features) as the concerned multiple index table.

You should either leave it empty (then the default /AIF/STD_IDX_TBL will be used) or maintain your own single-index table in field Message Idx Table (/AIF/CUST => Define Namespace-Specific Features => Define Interface-Specific Features).

entry.title: Intermittent CSS(Cascading Style Sheet) not applied to BTP standalone AppRouter when redirecting 403
entry.content:
Dear,

While I'm testing AppRouter with Spring-boot Java application in BTP, I met an issue as below and so please check it. 

I setup redirecting page for "403" error in AppRouter(xs-app.json)  and also configured it to call CSS to beautify the error page.

When redirecting 403 errorPage in BTP standalone AppRouter, the CSS intermittently is not applied to the error page.

How can I debug it to cope with this sympthom ?

Please let me know if you need more information for the understanding.

entry.title: Re: Enable SAP Companion in SAP Concur - SAP Enable Now
entry.content:
Hi Emmanuel,

Firstly, SAP Companion in Concur should look exactly the same as SAP Companion in Fiori because it's the same code that provides the SAP Companion interface and functionality.

SAP Companion must be turned on in Concur; individual customers must request that this done. 

I have seen Concur systems with the menu that you mention but it is another DAP, not SAP Companion.  Did you request that SAP Companion be turned on by generating the link to your SAP Companion configuration in Manager and adding it to a Concur support ticket with the type User Assistant / Tools.  Make sure that you include the URL of your SAP Companion configuration in the ticket and list the Concur systems(s) that it should be turned on in.

It's not wise to turn on the SAP Companion editor within the SAP Companion configuration in Manager, particularly once that configuration is used in a Production system, but as a test to see if it really is Companion, turn on the editor within the configuration in Manager and then refresh Concur.  If it is your configuration, the pencil should appear.

Hope this helps.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: How can we get details like Created By and Created On...
entry.content: Here is the link for my other question : https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/how-can-we-get-a-tadir-entry-for-any-given-object-in-s-4hana-public-cloud/qaq-p/13627784

entry.title: Re: SEN Bookpage Tracking
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you turned on tracking for the Simulation modes that must be tracked in the Workarea Playback Settings.  The Playback Settings for every mode of Simulation to be tracked should be set to the following settings and then Playback Settings then synchronized to Manager and published.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Upgrading to Latest Goal Management – Cycle Planning & Preparedness – Best Practice Approach
entry.content:
Hi,

Our performance year runs from July - June. We will upgrade to the latest goals for the next performance cycle with a new performance template. Our Development Plan template has ongoing goals, and rolls through without the requirement for a new template each year.  Can I confirm that when I convert the Development Plan template our employees will retain and be able to edit their existing goals? 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Cloud for Customer specific Configurations for Partner Channel Management
entry.content:
Hi all, 

Partner Portal is not supported anymore.

Please kindly use your own portal instead.

Thanks and Regards,
Molly

entry.title: Re: How can we get details like Created By and Created On...
entry.content: We don't expose the author or last change date for example. However if you expose the CDS View as an API you can get the field properties programmatically using the $metadata OData method as I mentioned above. Have a look also at 35D (https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2402/SolP/35D?region=DE). You can also look into extended the data model with Developer Extensibility (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/53b14a3c9f7d4837a9c1f271ee3b24a4/e86da62802f54212b2a255efb0224937.html?locale=en-US). But I think this will not help you with the Author or Last Changed info for the CDS View itself. If you describe your end goal/business requirement that you are trying to achieve, we may be able to provide some other guidance.

However, the issue mentioned in question 13632996 is before modification. None of the above can directly open the creation page. I don't know where the problem lies.

entry.title: Re: Simulation SAP Enable Now
entry.content: Thanks Dirk, it's working perfectly! Does this mean that "Practice Bubble at Element" will cause all the bubbles to move to the center of the screen?

entry.title: Re: SAP Application Interface Framework - Collected Developer Blogs
entry.content:
hello , Great Blog , thanks for sharing .

i have a situation to partially process the records in payload and rest mark as error, which needs to reprocess later in AIF .. question : how to edit a value in payload via ABAP code ? is there any existing BADI / FM / Class which can do this ? thanks for sharing .. SNK

entry.title: Re: Simulation SAP Enable Now
entry.content: If this option is selected then when you first record a simulation, all Practice bubbles will be positioned in the center of the screen. Authors can still move them; it's just a default. And changing this setting after recording won't magically move them - it's only used at the time of recording (which is why it's in Authoring Settings > Recording...).

entry.title: Re: Simulation SAP Enable Now
entry.content: I see, thanks for your explanation!

entry.title: Re: CRM: Planned SKF (ABGMNG) values not updated in ECC
entry.content: Hi Srini,

entry.title: Re: CRM: Planned SKF (ABGMNG) values not updated in ECC
entry.content: Did you find a solution for this, please? We are facing the same issue.

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite - How to use Filter component in examples
entry.content:
Hi, I tried the filter expression with $(property.???} and it always comes back with the error. 

org.apache.camel.builder.xml.InvalidXPathExpression: Invalid xpath: /ArrayList/item[iFlowName = ${property.iflowname}]. Reason: javax.xml.xpath.XPathExpressionException: net.sf.saxon.trans.XPathException: expected "<name>", found "{", cause: net.sf.saxon.trans.XPathException: expected "<name>", found "{"

Please help.... Thanks

Here is my filter expression. 

and here is my xml. 

<ArrayList>
<item>
<iFlowName>Flow-2</iFlowName>
<retryFrequency>5</retryFrequency>
<retryMaxCount>55</retryMaxCount>
</item>
<item>
<iFlowName>Flow-1</iFlowName>
<retryFrequency>5</retryFrequency>
<retryMaxCount>55</retryMaxCount>
</item>
</ArrayList>

entry.title: Dollar sign formating not showing in front
entry.content: When click to show sign in formula formatting, the dollar sigh is appearring behind of the amount and not in front of the amout. How can format it to show in fron of the amount

entry.title: Re: COGI BAPI
entry.content: You can set up a batch job to run the program CORUPROC / CORUAFWP at defined frequency. For CORUAFWP , you can specify a plant and storage location and save a variant, then set up a batch job with the program and variant (T-code: SM36). For CORUPROC , you can save a variant and set up a batch job (T-code: SM36).

entry.title: What is the best way to add Functional Locations to the EPPM Revenue Projects?
entry.content:
Could we organise our company projects according to the Functional locations? Will this make any sense? If not what is the purpose of having this field in the Projects ? My POV is from the S4HANA Public Cloud perspective.

Will you create a hierarchy of the "Functional Locations" according to the delivering company departments structure or according to the Customers projects location?

entry.title: About checking Standard price
entry.content:
Hi expert.

Is there a way to check whether the standard price used in posting confirmation for production order is the standard price released in this month?

Thank you.

entry.title: SF Employee Central Contingent Worker End Date error
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using Contingent Worker functionality in EC. We have a contingent worker record with work order end date of March 8th, 2024. On top of this record we have rehired them as full time employee with effective date of March 17th, 2024. Now when we try to update the work order end date from March 8th to March 15th, we are getting an error - Employment Information : Before rehiring an employee, you must dissociate existing employment information.

We have tried updating the work order end date via UI and Imports but getting the same error.

We tried the same scenario in another instance and its working properly there.

Any inputs/insights are appreciated!

entry.title: How can I access my APP when it is deployed on the BTP platform
entry.content: I deployed my project to BTP platform by cf push command, and it has been successful. But I want to access my project in BTP, I found my deployed app in application, but I don't know how to access it. I found a url under Application Routes, but the page cannot be accessed after opening. I don't know whether my operation is correct? Please tell me how to access my app correctly.Thank you！

entry.title: Implications of the TLS change on the SAP Linux servers
entry.content:
Does your current version of S4 HANA support TLS 1.2 and are there any changes that need to be done within the application if we change the TLS settings on the Server hosting the S4 HANA application?

If we change the SSL version to support SSL 3.0 and above within the server OS, would there be any changes and impact on the S4 HANA application ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Implications of the TLS change on the SAP Linux servers
entry.content:
Yes, the current version of S4 HANA does support TLS 1.2. TLS is widely used for communication and data transfer over a network. If you change the TLS settings on the server hosting the S4 HANA application, there should not be a significant impact on the application itself.

In term of SSL 3.0, it is largely outdated and prone to certain types of security vulnerabilities. As such, to uphold the highest level of data security, it is strongly recommended to use the latest version of TLS instead of SSL 3.0.

If you decide to configure your server to use SSL 3.0, you might face compatibility issues or possible communication errors with some clients or services which do not support outdated SSL protocol. You would also potentially be placing your data at risk due to the outdated security of SSL 3.0.

entry.title: What is Basic data 2?
entry.content: What is Basic data 2?

entry.content: Hi, I am new. I have recently attended 2 SFX exam, where can I see my badges?

entry.title: Re: Connect SAP BTP to S4Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

I just tried again whole processes, from the beginning - create a new trial account in BTP, then create a destination in BTP, finally connect to BAS, and don't find an error. It works. I checked the configuration in your screen shot and also didn't find an error. Can you check if you upload the newest Trust in Cloud System which is downloaded from BTP destination?

Best Regards,

Zhehui

entry.title: Re: Release strategy for po
entry.content:
Hi,

You may control the authorization for release codes via auth object M_EINK_FRG.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Getting started with Agile for SAP - 8 steps to success
entry.content:
The success factor for agile is adoption: if you feel you will fail to reach 80/90% adoption rate when moving from waterfall methodology, then you can look at Wagile methodology: https://cloudcoach.com/blog/what-is-wagile-project-management/

These is an intermediate methodology where the business need, personas, use cases is collected in agile mode, while keeping the testing, delivery, documentation in waterfall mode.

these can be a 2-5 years period to convince business people of the value of agile methodology.

entry.title: Re: Development Experience Sharing for SAC Widget Add-on
entry.content: Hi @marouferchichi, Eric has finished his assignment in our team. I checked with him, yes, you can refer to this post in your blog. Thank you, Sharon

entry.title: Re: Connect SAP BAS to SAP Public Cloud Problem
entry.content: Hi, Can you provide some screen shots of your configurations in Destination and Cloud System? That would be helpful. Best Regards, Zhehui

entry.title: Re: Step-by-Step Guide: Creating a Custom Migration Object: SAP QM Certificate Profile
entry.content: Did the project got activated when you put the ZDMC_PLV_OLO in the include result include

entry.title: Re: Use of Price Per Unit in Material Master & PO
entry.content: Yes, the difference will be there in 3rd decimal, if the quantity is less. However, the difference in 3rd decimal is not relevant when you use a 2 decimal currency!

entry.title: Re: Approval Process
entry.content:
Hi

  In Outgoing Payment when user clicks on Add it goes for Approval. We want when user checks in Approval Status report if it is approved then it should not allow the user to send it again for approval. As of now user can send it for approval.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to refresh ALV Data in SALV on Click Event.
entry.content:
Hey @Sandra_Rossi Please find my Code Complete below.

*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Class (Implementation) lcl_data
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
CLASS lcl_data IMPLEMENTATION.
METHOD get_data.
SELECT a~belnr,
a~bstat,
b~company_code,
b~fiscal_year,
b~posting_date,
b~document_date,
b~document_type
FROM bkpf AS a
INNER JOIN zfit_cashjournal AS b
ON a~belnr = b~document_number
INTO TABLE @rt_data
WHERE a~bstat = 'V'
AND b~zdoth_tdr_no = @space
AND b~company_code = '1000'.

IF sy-subrc = 0.
SORT rt_data BY belnr.
DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM rt_data COMPARING belnr.
ENDIF.
ENDMETHOD.

METHOD process_data.
gt_tdrdisp = it_data.
ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Form display
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& text
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& --> p1 text
*& <-- p2 text
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
FORM display.
*Create alv object.
TRY.
CALL METHOD cl_salv_table=>factory
IMPORTING
r_salv_table = lo_gr_alv
CHANGING
t_table = gt_tdrdisp.
CATCH cx_salv_msg.
ENDTRY.

lo_gr_alv->set_screen_status( pfstatus = 'ZINTTDRS'
report = sy-repid
set_functions = lo_gr_alv->c_functions_all
).
lr_selections = lo_gr_alv->get_selections( ).
lr_selections->set_selection_mode( if_salv_c_selection_mode=>row_column ).

lo_gr_functions = lo_gr_alv->get_functions( ).
lo_gr_functions->set_all( abap_true ).

* Fit the columns
lo_columns = lo_gr_alv->get_columns( ).
lo_columns->set_optimize( abap_true ).

lo_columns = lo_gr_alv->get_columns( ).

"events
gr_events = lo_gr_alv->get_event( ).
CREATE OBJECT event_handler.
SET HANDLER event_handler->user_command FOR gr_events.

* Display alv
lo_gr_alv->display( ).

ENDFORM.
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Class (Implementation) lcl_handel_events
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
CLASS lcl_handel_events IMPLEMENTATION.
METHOD user_command.

DATA: gt_final TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF zfit_cashjournal.

SELECT *
FROM zfit_cashjournal
INTO TABLE gt_final.

gt_rows = lr_selections->get_selected_rows( ).

CASE e_salv_function.
WHEN 'GTDR'.
IF gt_rows IS INITIAL.
MESSAGE 'Please Select atleast one document' TYPE 'I' DISPLAY LIKE 'E'.
ELSE.
TYPES: BEGIN OF ts_docgen,
document_number TYPE zfit_cashjournal-document_number,

company_code TYPE zfit_cashjournal-company_code,
fiscal_year TYPE zfit_cashjournal-fiscal_year,
item TYPE zfit_cashjournal-item,
fund TYPE zfit_cashjournal-fund,
receipt_key TYPE zfit_cashjournal-receipt_key,
doc_num TYPE char5,
END OF ts_docgen.


DATA: lt_docgen TYPE TABLE OF ts_docgen.
LOOP AT gt_rows INTO DATA(gs_rows) .
READ TABLE gt_tdrdisp INTO gs_tdrdisp INDEX gs_rows.
APPEND gs_tdrdisp TO gt_temp.
ENDLOOP.


SELECT document_number,
company_code,
fiscal_year,
item,
fund,
receipt_key
FROM zfit_cashjournal
FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @gt_temp
WHERE document_number = @gt_temp-belnr
INTO TABLE @lt_docgen.

* LOOP AT gt_temp INTO gs_temp.
LOOP AT lt_docgen ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_docgen>).
<fs_docgen>-fund = <fs_docgen>-fund(1).
<fs_docgen>-receipt_key = <fs_docgen>-receipt_key(1).
* APPEND gs_docgen TO gt_final.
ENDLOOP.

DATA(lt_temp_gen) = lt_docgen.
SORT lt_temp_gen BY fund receipt_key.
DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM lt_temp_gen COMPARING fund receipt_key.

DATA: lv_document_number TYPE char5.


LOOP AT lt_temp_gen ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_temp_gen>).
CLEAR : lv_document_number.

CALL FUNCTION 'NUMBER_GET_NEXT'
EXPORTING
nr_range_nr = '01'
object = 'ZFI_INTTDR'
* QUANTITY = '1'
* SUBOBJECT = ' '
* TOYEAR = '0000'
* IGNORE_BUFFER = ' '
IMPORTING
number = lv_document_number
* QUANTITY =
* RETURNCODE =
EXCEPTIONS
interval_not_found = 1
number_range_not_intern = 2
object_not_found = 3
quantity_is_0 = 4
quantity_is_not_1 = 5
interval_overflow = 6
buffer_overflow = 7
OTHERS = 8.
IF sy-subrc = 0.
<fs_temp_gen>-doc_num = lv_document_number.
ENDIF.

LOOP AT lt_docgen ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_gen>).
IF <fs_gen>-fund(1) = <fs_temp_gen>-fund(1)
AND <fs_gen>-receipt_key(1) = <fs_temp_gen>-receipt_key(1).
<fs_gen>-doc_num = lv_document_number.
ENDIF.

UPDATE zfit_cashjournal SET zdoth_tdr_no = <fs_gen>-doc_num
WHERE document_number = <fs_gen>-document_number
AND item = <fs_gen>-item
AND fiscal_year = <fs_gen>-fiscal_year.
ENDLOOP.
ENDLOOP.
MESSAGE 'Internal TDR Created for the Selected Documents' TYPE 'I' DISPLAY LIKE 'S'.

* BREAK-POINT.
* ENDLOOP.
lo_gr_alv->refresh( refresh_mode = if_salv_c_refresh=>full ).
ENDIF.
WHEN 'BACK'.
LEAVE TO SCREEN 0.
* WHEN 'REFRESH'.
*
* lo_gr_alv->get_selections( ).
* lo_gr_alv->refresh( ).
ENDCASE.
ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

entry.title: Change of valuation category - What is the best approach?
entry.content:
I understand valuation category of materials for which orders/batches exists cannot be changed until the orders and batches are archived and deleted.

I have around 20000 materials in plant 1001. These materials are also present in multiple plants. The requirement is to have "Batch SPLIT valuation" in only plant 1001. The rest of the plants don't need any change. What is the best approach to achieve this?

1. Create new materials for all 20000 materials and extend it to all plants (and create new master data for BOMs, Routings as well)?

OR

2. Create a new plant (Let's say Plant 1002) and extend the existing materials to this new plant and change valuation category to "X" (Batch Split Valuation)?

entry.title: Re: Change Material in Sales Order Line Item Using BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE
entry.content: The field MATNR is protected in standard only , also i have filled all bapi parameters correctly according to bapi_salesorder_change example , like updateflag etc...

entry.title: Re: FMS not working correctly
entry.content:
Hi,

The FMS trigger works with UI only. That means when user opens PO screen and have the condition change, then FMS will work. Remember to click Add/Update button to save. After that, you can query the data from table.

Hope this helps,

Son Tran

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano

This looks like a great initiative and I will love to be a part of it, 

I Identify as a person in the below categories:

  • People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts 
  • Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location 
  • First generation college students

 

Thanks for your time

entry.title: Re: Reclassification of Quantity and Unit of Measure | SA...
entry.content: Thanks for your reply. Is it possible to create a new field in ACDOCU table for maintaining Group Quantity, in the same manner as we have the fields for Amount in LC, Amount in GC and Quantity?

entry.title: Re: Setting Year parameter to Data Action based on input...
entry.content:
@mayiya 

Fecha Inicio Proyección This one can be set using the Input control. make sure the parameter is set as below

Also the formula input control should return Date format of SAC which is YYYYMM. 

 

For Año Proyeccion you can set it with an input control which returns YYYY

Alternatively you can use scripting to set the parameter values on a button click and then set it to execute. In scripting you have more control to manipulate the string parameters.

Br.

Nikhil

Gaurav

entry.title: How to export the inspection characteristics data in routings in mass?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Could you please help me with exporting the inspection characteristics data in routings in mass? Is there any standard way to achieve this?

Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to export the inspection characteristics data in...
entry.content:
Hi,

You can use API_PRODUCTION_ROUTING;v=0002 to export the inspection characteristics of a routing in mass. 
Please refer to the Help Portal for more details.

BR
SAP Product Support
